THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM, YOUNG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARK, HYUK DBA MC ROOFING COMPANY $3,900.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,950.00, (PAYMENT WILL BE BY CASH, CASHIERS CHECK, OR MONEY ORDER & MUST BE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF TOM BY THE 3RD OF EACH MONTH. IF DEFENDANT PARK DEFAULTS ON ANY MONTHLY PAYMENTS, THEN THE REMAINING BALANCE WILL IMMEDIATELY DUE.) PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON APR-03-2009 AND ON THE 3RD DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
